name: OANDA v20 (forex)
description: Broker execution plugin for OANDA fxTrade (forex + CFD) via the oandapyV20 SDK. Demo (practice) account default for paper mode. BYOK via the OS keychain (broker:oanda:access_token + broker:oanda:account_id). NOTE: the oandapyV20 SDK was last released 2021-08; users should monitor security advisories independently.
author: Vysted Team
